# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.0.0/),
and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).

## [Unreleased]

### Added
- Comprehensive README.md with project overview, installation, and usage instructions
- CONTRIBUTING.md with contribution guidelines and development workflow
- CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md based on Contributor Covenant v2.0
- DEVELOPMENT.md with detailed Jekyll and development information
- CHANGELOG.md to track project changes

### Changed
- Updated .gitignore to include new documentation files

## [1.0.0] - 2024-02-28

### Added
- GitHub Actions blog post
- CodeQL security scanning
- Automated deployment via GitHub Actions

### Changed
- Migrated to Jekyll 4.4.1
- Updated dependencies in Gemfile

## Historical Changes

This project has been actively maintained since 2010. For a complete history of changes, please refer to the [commit history](https://github.com/dauble/dauble.github.io/commits/master).

### Major Milestones

- **2020-04**: Migrated from WordPress to Jekyll
- **2017-2019**: Regular blog posts about WordPress development
- **2010-2015**: Initial blog posts and website foundation

---

**Note**: This changelog was created in January 2026 as part of improving project documentation. Historical changes before this date are summarized above.
